title: CITE-seq
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7m80v","text":"This protocol is for performing CITE-seq only. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"cnahd","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b0ohv","text":"Cellular Indexing of Transcriptomes and Epitopes by Sequencing (CITE-seq) is a multimodal single cell phenotyping method developed in the Technology Innovation lab at the New York Genome Center in collaboration with the Satija lab.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":64,"length":8},{"key":1,"offset":138,"length":25}],"data":[]},{"key":"a5g7t","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"clab7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"72stu","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"231l5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"58lm5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8bb9d","text":"CITE-seq uses DNA-barcoded antibodies to convert detection of proteins into a quantitative, sequenceable readout.  Antibody-bound oligos act as synthetic transcripts that are captured during most large-scale oligodT-based scRNA-seq library preparation protocols (e.g. 10x Genomics, Drop-seq, ddSeq).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"16crg","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"euk6n","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7oq8f","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":3,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"4bkfe","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1eqo","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"758v8","text":"This allows for immunophenotyping of cells with a potentially limitless number of markers and unbiased transcriptome analysis using existing single-cell sequencing approaches.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"9E6189D0E81F40248F9E77C52998BC13","url":"https://www.nature.com/articles/nmeth.4380"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BE7F41886E9840839D06082ABD8EA9B4","url":"http://www.nygenome.org/lab-groups-overview/technology-innovation-lab/"}},"2":{"type":"imageblock","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"B446CFE960E846C39F756992AADD5444","height":"83","is_video":false,"mime":null,"original_name":"Screen guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"68un4","text":"The protocol workflow is as follows: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":37}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"59k17","text":"Cell staining for Drop-seq or 10x Genomics","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ufbj","text":"​Drop-seq (Macosko et al. , 2015) or 10x Genomics single cell 3’ v2 assay","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":1,"length":8},{"key":1,"offset":37,"length":36}],"data":[]},{"key":"8rslb","text":"cDNA amplification","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"8d4uh","text":"Separating ADT-derived cDNAs (\u003c180bp) and mRNA-derived cDNAs (\u003e300bp)","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"122ja","text":"Amplifying ADT sequencing library","type":"ordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"33p4c","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"v8q7","text":"Sequencing CITE-seq libraries:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":30}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b6918","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2lv03","text":"We estimate that an average of 100 molecules per ADT per cell is sufficient to achieve useful information, we typically sequence our ADT / HTO libraries to obtain significantly more reads than this per cell. ADT and cDNA sequencing libraries can be pooled at desired proportions. We typically sequence ADT libraries in 5-10% of a lane and cDNA library fraction at 90% of a lane (HiSeq2500 Rapid Run).","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"6rr2s","text":" ","type":"align-justify","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"e7f89","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"anpdm","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":[]},{"key":"cpndq","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fb8ig","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"ang6f","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"98hpb","text":"Oligonucleotide sequences: ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":27}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"h6d5","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"1epf3","text":"CITE-seq antibody-oligos (ADTs): ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fij76","text":"These contain standard small TruSeq RNA read 2 sequences and can be amplified using Illumina’s Truseq Small RNA primer sets (RPIx – primers, see example RPI1 below). steps: Carefully count all cells to ensure accurate quantitation. ● Make note of cell viability (>95%) and also include dead cells in the total cell count. ● If you observe many dead cells, live cell enrichment (e.g. by FACS) is recommended.
Resuspend ~1-2 million cells in 100 µl Staining buffer (2%BSA/0.02%Tween, PBS). undetermined, Staining buffer
Add 10 µl Fc Blocking reagent (FcX, BioLegend). undetermined, Fc Blocking reagent
Incubate for 10 minutes at 4˚C. Undetermined, Incubation 00:10:00, Incubation
While cells are incubating in Fc Block, prepare antibody-pool using ~0.5 - 1 µg (or titrated amounts) of each CITE-seq antibody.
Add antibody-oligo pool to cells.
Incubate for 30 minutes at 4˚C. Undetermined, Incubation 00:30:00, Incubation
Wash cells with 1 mL Staining buffer. (wash 1/3) undetermined, Staining buffer
Wash cells with 1 mL Staining buffer. (wash 2/3) undetermined, Staining buffer
Wash cells with 1 mL Staining buffer. (wash 3/3) undetermined, Staining buffer
Spin 5 minutes 400g at 4˚C. (wash 1/3) Undetermined, Spinning 00:05:00, Spinning
Spin 5 minutes 400g at 4˚C. (wash 2/3) Undetermined, Spinning 00:05:00, Spinning
Spin 5 minutes 400g at 4˚C. (wash 3/3) Undetermined, Spinning 00:05:00, Spinning
Resuspend cells in PBS at appropriate concentration for downstream application. E.g. ​for 10x​ ~500 cells/µl; for Drop-seq​ [~200 cells/µl].
Filter cells through 40 µm strainers (e.g. Flowmi cell strainer)
Verify cell concentration by counting on hemocytometer after filtration.
Run ​ Drop-seq (Macosko ​et al.​, 2015) or ​ 10x Genomics single cell 3’ v2 assay as described until before cDNA amplification.

Add “additive” primers to cDNA PCR to increase yield of ADT products: ADT PCR additive primer (2 µM): 1 µl (for 10x Genomics) or 0.4 µl (for Drop-seq) Subtract the total volume of additive primer from the water added to the PCR reaction.
Perform SPRI selection to separate mRNA-derived and antibody-oligo-derived cDNAs.
DO NOT DISCARD SUPERNATANT FROM 0.6X SPRI. THIS CONTAINS THE ADTs!
Add 0.6X SPRI to cDNA reaction as described in 10x Genomics or Drop-seq protocol.
Incubate 5 minutes and place on magnet. 00:05:00, Incubation
● Supernatant contains ADTs. ● Beads contain full length mRNA-derived cDNAs.
Proceed with standard 10x or Drop-seq protocol for cDNA sequencing library preparation. For ADTs <180bp (supernatant fraction), follow the sections below.
To purify ADTs using two 2X SPRI purifications per manufacturer protocol, first, add 1.4X SPRI to supernatant to obtain a final SPRI volume of 2X SPRI.
Transfer entire volume into a low-bind 1.5 mL tube.
Incubate 10 minutes at room temperature. 00:10:00, Incubation
Place tube on magnet and wait ~2 minutes until solution is clear. 00:02:00, Magnet
Carefully remove and discard the supernatant.
Add 400 µl 80% Ethanol to the tube without disturbing the pellet and stand for 30 seconds (only one Ethanol wash). undetermined, 80% Ethanol 00:00:30, Ethanol wash
Carefully remove and discard the ethanol wash.
Centrifuge tube briefly and return it to magnet.
Remove and discard any remaining ethanol.
Resuspend in beads in 50 µl water undetermined, Water

Mix by pipetting.
Incubate 10 minutes at room temperature. 00:10:00, Incubation
Place tube on magnet and wait ~2 minutes until solution is clear. 00:02:00, Magnet
Carefully remove and discard the supernatant.
Add 200 µl 80% Ethanol to the tube without disturbing the pellet and stand for 30 seconds (1 st Ethanol wash). undetermined, 80% Ethanol 00:00:30, 1. Ethanol wash
Carefully remove and discard the ethanol wash.
Add 200 µl 80% Ethanol to the tube without disturbing the pellet and stand for 30 seconds (2 nd Ethanol wash). undetermined, 80% Ethanol 00:00:30, 2. Ethanol wash
Carefully remove and discard the ethanol wash.
Centrifuge tube briefly and return it to magnet.
Remove and discard any remaining ethanol.
Allow the beads to air dry for 2 minutes (do not over dry beads). 00:02:00, Air drying
Resuspend beads in 45 µl water. undetermined, Water
Pipette mix vigorously.
Incubate mix at room temperature for 5 minutes. 00:05:00, Incubation
Place tube on magnet and transfer clear supernatant into PCR tube.

ADT libraries are now ready to be sequenced. Quantify libraries by standard methods (QuBit, BioAnalyzer, qPCR). ADT libraries will be around 180 bp (Figure 1).
